CustomField.description: FEGLI Basic Life total current benefit = BIA x (1 + age multiplication factor). The age source is Age_Option_Basic_Manual__c (picklist) ONLY when no FEGLI code is set AND that picklist is filled in; in every other case Contact_Age__c is used. Replaces the previous hiddenTotalBenefitformula__c, which did not handle the manual-age path correctly.
CustomField.label: Total Basic Benefit
